versions.note: Shipped in the app and the web demo

changed: First end-to-end build: YOLO11s-cls fine-tuned for 40 epochs on 11,720 ISIC dermatoscopic images.
Exported to TensorFlow Lite and wired into the Flutter app and this in-browser demo (fully on-device).
Decision threshold deliberately set to 0.137 instead of the default 0.5, to prioritise catching malignant lesions.
improved: Established the baseline: ROC-AUC 0.914 on held-out data.
Catches 90% of malignant lesions (sensitivity) while still clearing 75% of benign ones — far better than the 'always benign' 80%-accuracy trap.

inProgress: v2 — adding the PAD-UFES-20 clinical-photo dataset, so the model also learns from ordinary phone-camera images rather than dermatoscope images only.
